title: Yijing Hexagram 13: Tong Ren (Fellowship with Men)
description: Hexagram 13 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 13 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Fellowship with men in the open. Success. It furthers one to cross the great water. The perseverance of the superior man furthers.
